chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln No.S-713 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.4278 /2025. 2. For orders on O/objection at flag-A. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4279/2025. 4. For hearing of bail application. 19.08.2025 Mr. Deedar Ali Chohan, Advocate alongwith applicants. ******** 1. Urgency allowed. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted, subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through instant application, applicants Ayaz alias Zahoor son of Haji Khan alias Hajan Solangi and Hazoor Bux son of Gul Muhammad Solangi seek protective bail in Crime No.92/2024 Police Station, Mithiani under Sections 302, 324, 337F(vi), 337H(ii), 147, 148, 149, 504 PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants are innocent and have falsely been involved in this case by the complainant with malafide intention and ulterior motives. It is further contended that as soon as applicants came to know they tried to surrender themselves before the concerned Court for pre- arrest bail but applicants have grave apprehension of their being arrest before reaching the same at the hands of concerned police hence, they have approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits and demerits of the case and in order to enable applicants to appear before concerned Court, they are granted protective bail for a period of 05(Five) days commencing from today, subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile operation of NBWs, if any, issued against the applicants is suspended for the aforesaid period.

Be that as it may, without touching merits and demerits of the case and in order to enable applicants to appear before concerned Court, they are granted protective bail for a period of 05(Five) days commencing from today, subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each (Rupees Fifty thousand) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile operation of NBWs, if any, issued against the applicants is suspended for the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicants before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicants fail to surrender before the learned trial Court within stipulated period, their bail bond shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/PS
